name: COPT DEFENSE PROPERTIES
business: COPT Defense Properties is a fully-integrated and self-managed real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on owning, operating and developing properties in locations proximate to, or sometimes containing, key U.S. Government (USG) defense installations and missions. Its tenants include the USG and its defense contractors, who are primarily engaged in priority national security activities. The property portfolio is predominantly comprised of office properties and single-tenant data center shells.

exposures.sentence: COPT Defense Properties ... focused on owning, operating and developing properties in locations proximate to, or sometimes containing, key U.S. Government (USG) defense installations and missions
intelligence, surveillance, reconnaissance, missile defense and space activities, cybersecurity and network activities

catalysts.event: Three fully-leased development properties expected to be placed in service
catalysts.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, we had an aggregate of 646,000 square feet under development in five properties that were 58% leased, including: three fully-leased properties expected to be placed in service in 2027

catalysts.event: Two development properties expected to be placed in service in 2026 and 2027
catalysts.sentence: two properties across our Fort Meade/BW Corridor and Redstone Arsenal sub-segments with minimal pre-leasing being developed to accommodate future anticipated USG and contractor demand, which are expected to be placed in service in 2026 and 2027
